---
title: 'Projects'
subtitle: 'Data analysis & visualization projects using R/Python.'
css: '/src/styles/projects.css'
include-after-body: '../../src/scripts/responsive-tag-bar.html'
toc: false
sidebar: false
listing:
  id: projects-listing
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort: "order asc"
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: "0px"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 20
---
